title: scyphostelma rugosum
intro: Scyphostelma rugosum, a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, is commonly known as a succulent. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Scyphostelma rugosum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Scyphostelma rugosum is often used in teas, infusions, or extracts, and it may also be used topically as a poultice to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
